Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 432}Hey, kid. Here for your first shrine visit of the year, eh? I'll have to pay my own respects after work.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 432}Today's yo-yo fishing is a New Year's version. Great luck if you catch it, worst luck if it breaks![n]{f 1 1}
